_info: Matrix config — edit manually or run:  matrix -c
_chars: katakana | latin | numbers | binary | symbols | hex | mixed | custom
_head_color: color of the leading character on each stream
_density: stream spawn probability per column  (0 = none  0.30 = dense)
_sparkle: random stream cells briefly flash to head_color
_fade_edges: vignette — dims streams near screen edges
_wave: sinusoidal density ripple sweeping across columns
_color_cycle: slowly rotate stream hue over time
_title: text shown on screen — leave empty to hide
_ascii_font: figlet font name  e.g.  standard  big  doom  slant
_title_bg: background color behind title  empty = black
_exit_hint: show  Q quit  in the bottom-right corner
